seo.title: Arjuna Arjuna Lyrics Aai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Arjuna Arjuna from Aai is a lively and cheerful duet that reflects the joy and excitement of love and celebration. It captures the essence of youthful exuberance, as the lyrics convey a sense of wonder and happiness in the presence of a loved one. The upbeat melody and energetic vocals create an atmosphere of festivity, making it suitable for weddings and parties. Overall, the song evokes feelings of joy and togetherness, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Arjuna Arjuna from the movie Aai is a vibrant and energetic duet that showcases the delightful collaboration between singers Shobiya and Udit Narayan. The lively beats composed by Srikanth Deva perfectly complement the joyous lyrics, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. Dive into the enchanting world of this song that captures the essence of happiness and togetherness!
stanzaMeanings: Arjuna, Arjuna, the arrow is released, Arjuna, by you, by you, the heart dances, Arjuna.
When I see God in my dreams, the sleeping child smiles.
When I see you in person, my heart jumps with joy.
Moon, moon, come, come, come, without the moon, you also run away.
Arjuna, Arjuna, the arrow is released, Arjuna, by you, by you, the heart dances, Arjuna.
Come with a playful spirit, look at me with anger, come and hit me, come, come, come.
With sincerity, understand all the desires of womanhood, come and see me, come, come, come.
When I see your beauty while you are sleeping, my heart blooms.
In my dreams, I think of you, I will cherish you.
In my dreams, I think of you, I will cherish you.
When I see your beauty in the world, it will shake my heart.
Moon, moon, come, come, come, without the moon, you also run away.
Arjuna, Arjuna, the arrow is released, Arjuna, by you, by you, the heart dances, Arjuna.
When I see your eyes, I will look at you closely, hey hey hey.
When I am near you, I will understand and lose myself, hey hey hey.
I have accepted defeat, I have accepted defeat, today I am not there, I accept defeat.
I have been pushed away, I have been pushed away, your heart is not there, I have been pushed away.
Truth is false, false is truth, love has many troubles, I have understood that too.
Arjuna, Arjuna, the arrow is released, Arjuna, by you, by you, the heart dances, Arjuna.
When I see God in my dreams, the sleeping child smiles.
When I see you in person, my heart jumps with joy.
Moon, moon, come, come, come, without the moon, you also run away.
